feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Custom Entity - SAP RAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I created a CDS based on a custom entity in SAP RAP cloud. I added a new button to this CDS. This button will perform an action on all records displayed on the screen. However, in the class I defined in the behavior, I cannot read the data on the screen. How can I do it?"

Thanks,

entry.title: Validate FI Document
entry.content:
Hi Team,

During MIGO posting, a background FI document is created, and the GL clearing account is also added. We need to validate the GL clearing account.

So, Please provide any User Exits or BADI's or enhancement point..

Thanks In Advance,

Regards,

Maheswar.

entry.title: ABAP CERTIFICATION
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to do the ABAP certification exam but i don't feel ready, i have only read from the sap training hub . If anyone has dump files or sites i can do trial papers please share. Any tips will be highly appreciated.

entry.title: Transporting cross client object- generated from SLXT
entry.content:
Hello All,

 

I have one problem with transport I have maintained German translations in German language for industry sector(Business partner) via Se63 and then from SLXT I created the transport of copies which has all my translation that I created. Now I am using the standard method to move the TR from Dev system to QA system but changes are not reflecting in QA system even though the TR is released.
Is there any leads how can I transport the translations from one system to another?

Thank you!

entry.title: How to find out BADIs of Post General Journal Entries APP
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Environments:
SAP S/4HANA CLOUD 2408
and
SAP BTP, ABAP environment 2408

I want to post some data to add-on table(BTP ABAP environment) by custom API
when I post a new journal entry with APP - Post General Journal Entries(S/4HANA Cloud Public).

There are any BAdis I can use with developer extensibility to do that?
or how to find each BAdis implement to which app?

kindly thanks for help.

entry.title: ABAP RAP Custom Entity with Parameter not allowed
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

I have created custom entity and Implemented if_rap_query_provider~select method. Service I created in V4 API.

This custom entity is with NO parameter is working as expected and returning all results.

When I added parameter to this Custom Entity It started giving me below Error ->

Entity 'ZCE_TU_DETAILS': Parameter entity set '$PARAMETER$ZCE_TU_DETAILS' cannot be used for read

I do not know how to test or use this Custom Entity with parameter... please help pointing to any documentation or example...

I have followed below documentation:

https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-rap/using-parameters-in-unmanaged-query?version=sap_btp 

Please help...

@Ramjeekorada @Ramjee_korada 

Thanks-

entry.title: Types of CDS Views
entry.content:
I'm completely new to ABAP on cloud .Now, I'm started to learn and work on eclipse adt by own. I want to know about the cds view types. In some blogs, it mentioned as consumption, basic and projection as types. While in others projection, consumption, analytical and cubic as types and they mentioned code templates as types. I'm really confused . What is the exact answer ?.Pls guide me .

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition  #eclipse #CdsViews

entry.title: SAP S/4 HANA Cloud APIs to create Customer Invoices?
entry.content:
Hello,

I have the requirement to upload Customer Invoices within S4Hana from another 3rd party system

is there an API of any kind to create a Customer Invoice within s4?
I am unable to locate one in the Business Hub, and the only one properly titled Customer Invoice is to read from S4 instead.

Could somebody help me identify such a service?

entry.title: CDS Data Model for Analytical List Page
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I am trying to develop the Analytical List Page. I created CDS Data Model with Analytics annotations and I am exposing it via Odata V2 Service Binding. Unfortunately, as long as I keep the annotation @analytics.query: true in my C-View, I am getting an error in App preview: Fetch API (direct DB access) is not supported for entity

Unfortunately, exposing my C-View directly using @odata.publish: true as suggested in this blog is not an option, as our ABAP Language Version is ABAP for Cloud Development, this is not allowed.

Is there a way around this?

Best regards,
Radek

entry.title: Badi implementation in fb70
entry.content: I am implementing badi edoc_adaptor for changing edoc type in fb70 ...but in badi importing parameter io_source is object ... referring class cl_edoc_source  and cl_edoc_source has method get_data ... holding field symbol es_data ...so basically i wanted to access field symbol using get_data method but i dont know the approach

entry.title: how to read fields of structures
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

inside a custom report, I need to read some fields that are present in these structures:

 

AFVGD
AFRUD
CAUFVD
VIQMFE
RIWO00
VIQMUR

 

since they are structures, I can't do a Select, are there tables that I can use that are connected to these structures? Or are there Function Modules?


Thank you!

entry.title: S4HANA Sales Order API(A2X) taking longer processing time with huge number of line item
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have Integration between BTP-IS & S4 where we are creating Sales Orders in S4 using the API_SALES_ORDER_SRV API .

S4HANA Sales Order API (A2X) is taking longer processing time to create Sales Order with huge number of line items.

We have done lot of customizations to the api at abap end due to client requirements.

How can we fix this problem as it is taking 2 mins to create order with 100 line items.

 

SAP Integration Suite SAP BTP, ABAP environment SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment 

test automation tool for SAP S/4HANA Cloud 

SAP S/4HANA API Management API

entry.title: How to test ABAP RAP V4 service custom/instance Actions using Postman or SAP Gateway
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

Please help me point to location or documentations to test custom Actions created in ABAP RAP V4 Service.

Thanks-

entry.title: when any material document is created, also get posted. Could you please say it how to stop post
entry.content: when any material document is created, also get posted. Could you please say it how to stop post but i want material document number, IN MIGO SCREEN

entry.title: CDS Cube View for Purchase Orders
entry.content:
Hello experts,
I would like to use an analytical cube view for Purchase Order, Purchase Order Item and Purchase Order Item Schedule Line. Is there a cube view that I can use? I am looking for something similar to the I_SalesOrderCube. I only have the CDS views so far: I_PurchaseOrderAPI01, I_PurchaseOrderItemAPI01 & I_PurOrdScheduleLineAPI01, but I would have to convert them to a cube myself.
Greetings Niels

entry.title: enhance old VIM analytics report
entry.content:
Hi techies,

Recently i came across the old VIM analytics report (T-code : /n/opt/vim_analytics), the major difference between the new and old vim analytics report is the number of fields.

Hence, I want to know if there are any explicit or implicit enhancement options available in the old report so that I can customise it and add few more fields in the output ALV of the report? 

PS- tried looking for custom exits and BADIs but couldn't find any.

entry.title: ABAP RAP Unmanaged API not Triggering SAVE method
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

I have created V4 API using Unmanaged RAP Scenario... When I am trying to create record using API in Gateway test tool, records are getting creating in Draft mode and they are not getting Saved. SAVE method is not getting triggered... I have Implemented Early Numbering which is getting triggered along with Create Method...

Everything is working fine when I using testing same service using Preview Option in Eclipse.

Please help what am I missing...

Early Numbering code

METHOD earlynumbering_create.

    DATA: l_tanum         TYPE /scwm/tanum,
          l_returncode(1) TYPE c.
    CALL FUNCTION 'NUMBER_GET_NEXT'
      EXPORTING
        nr_range_nr        = '01'
        object             = wmegc_nrobj_to
        subobject          = 'WD01'
      IMPORTING
        number             = l_tanum
        returncode         = l_returncode
      EXCEPTIONS
        interval_not_found = 1.
    LOOP AT entities ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<lfs_entities>).
      l_tanum = l_tanum + 1.
      mapped-warehousetask  =   VALUE #(
        FOR ls_entities IN entities WHERE ( tanum is INITIAL )
        (
            %cid    = ls_entities-%cid
            %is_draft   =   ls_entities-%is_draft
            tanum   =   l_tanum
        )
      ).
    ENDLOOP.
  ENDMETHOD.

Behavior Definition

unmanaged implementation in class zbp_i_openwt unique;
strict;
with draft;
define behavior for ZI_OPENWT alias WarehouseTask
draft table Zordim_o_d
//late numbering
early numbering
lock master
total etag ChangeAt
authorization master ( global )
etag master ChangeAt
{
  create;
  update;
  delete;
  field ( readonly ) Tanum;
  field ( readonly ) CreatedBy;
  field ( readonly ) Letyp;
  field ( readonly ) CreatedAt;
  draft action Edit;
  draft action Activate;
  draft action Discard;
  draft action Resume;
  draft determine action Prepare;
  mapping for /scwm/ordim_o {
    Lgnum   =   lgnum;
    Tanum   =   tanum;
    Letyp   = letyp;
    Procty  = procty;
    Tostat  =   tostat;
    Vlenr   =   vlenr;
    ChangeAt    =   changed_at;
    CreatedAt   =   created_at;
    CreatedBy   =   created_by;
  }
}

CREATE method

  METHOD create.
    DATA: lo_entity_store TYPE REF TO zcl_datastore_rap,
          ls_entity       TYPE /scwm/s_ordim_o_rf.
    lo_entity_store = zcl_datastore_rap=>get_object(  ).
    LOOP AT entities ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<lfs_owt>).
      ls_entity-vlenr_o   = <lfs_owt>-vlenr.
      ls_entity-nlpla_o   = <lfs_owt>-nlpla.
      INSERT VALUE #( %cid = <lfs_owt>-%cid ) INTO TABLE mapped-warehousetask.
    ENDLOOP.
    lo_entity_store->put_data( data_in = ls_entity ).
  ENDMETHOD.

Please help.

Thanks-

entry.title: Unable to see CDS view or API or Cube in SAP Datasphere created in S4HANA public cloud
entry.content:
I am using S4hana Public cloud and integrating with sap datasphere with connection type as SAP ABAP

I have created custom CDS view in ADT by ecllipse, I want to view the custom CDS in SAP datasphere for which when i am declaring annotation DataExtraction.Enabled: true as below but i am getting error 

Description Resource Path Location Type
Use of Annotation 'Analytics.dataExtraction.enabled' is not permitted (not released) 

@saikat_pal5,@XSNAT

entry.title: I'm fresh graduate.
entry.content: I'm fresh graduate looking to go for sap abap.I want to learn SAP BTP. Guide me please. Where to begin from and which course should I choose for learning.

entry.title: Reservation movement allowed button disabled automatically
entry.content:
I have one requirement, During Reservation creation the document will be created and movemt allowed is automatically , on this time i want to create  and i want to remove tick on movement allowed box , after it will create that reservation number , with using that number i want to create one alv report with one user approval , that  user  apporoved that reservation number then that movement allowed is automatically enable tick


Kindly Share Your Thoughts!!!!
